text: Ohio counties with cases of diarrhea parasite: list - FOX 8 News
fullText: Health officials in Ohio confirm 177 cases of cyclosporiasis, a gastrointestinal illness caused by a microscopic parasite that can lead to severe diarrhea.

text: Live updates: Iran’s slain leader buried after days of strikes rock Middle East - CNN
fullText: The US-Iran ceasefire collapsed as exchanges of fire in recent days created fresh volatility in the Middle East. Follow for live updates.

text: Ukraine escalates attacks on tankers near Crimea as Russian fuel shortages bite - CNBC
fullText: The drone strikes form part of Ukraine's campaign designed to choke off supplies and transportation routes in and out of Crimea.

text: Chip giant SK Hynix raises $26.5 billion in blockbuster US share offering - Yahoo Finance
fullText: SK Hynix will begin trading on the Nasdaq on Friday, in the biggest foreign debut in the US.

text: Migrants who saw man killed by ICE in Houston say he did not ram officers - The Washington Post
fullText: Three men who were in the vehicle alongside Lorenzo Salgado Araujo are contesting the Department of Homeland Security’s account of the fatal shooting.

text: Live Updates: Iran and U.S. ramp up tit-for-tat strikes as Khamenei laid to rest - CBS News
fullText: Iran's former Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei was buried amid an escalating exchange of fire on the 132nd day of the war.

text: Dwayne Johnson receives career-worst reviews for Moana remake - The Independent
fullText: Actor’s latest stumble has seen him lambasted for the ‘fright wig’ he wears in the film, and for seeming as if ‘he is on autopilot like a piece of software’

text: Horoscope for Friday, July 10, 2026 - Chicago Sun-Times
Trump Pushes Out Remaining Members of Bipartisan Election Commission Ahead of Midterms - ProPublica
fullText: President Donald Trump has fired Benjamin Hovland and Thomas Hicks, the Democrats on the federal Election Assistance Commission, while Christy McCormick, the Republican, was allowed to resign, sources tell ProPublica.

text: Fed chief taps Trump ally Marc Andreessen to advise on how AI reshapes work - The Washington Post
fullText: Fed Chair Kevin Warsh named venture capitalist Marc Andreessen to co-lead a task force on AI's economic impact — a technology his firm has bet billions on.

text: On the same day, a Florida airport and a Tennessee bridge are renamed after Trump - NBC News
fullText: Palm Beach International Airport is now President Donald J. Trump International Airport, and a Jefferson County bridge is the President Donald J. Trump Bridge.

text: LA Galaxy coach Greg Vanney says Team USA was 'too naive,' explains Christian Pulisic's struggles - Fox News
fullText: Greg Vanney says Christian Pulisic's early injury robbed him of momentum and rhythm in an unforgiving World Cup knockout stage against Belgium.

text: Missing Michigan woman Lynette Hooker may have returned to her sailboat before disappearance in the Bahamas, source says - CBS News
fullText: Investigators are looking into the possibility that a Michigan woman who went missing in the Bahamas earlier this year may not have fallen overboard from a dinghy as her husband has claimed.

text: Thousands of ‘Pokémon Go’ Players Descend on Times Square to Defeat Mewtwo - WIRED
fullText: A surprise 10th-anniversary event saw Niantic fulfilling a promise teased in the original 2016 launch trailer for its popular mobile game.

text: Trump’s proposed triumphal arch clears another key hurdle - The Washington Post
fullText: The National Capital Planning Commission, led by the president’s allies, voted to advance the project near Arlington Cemetery, tabling a height question for later.

text: France's Kylian Mbappé allays any World Cup injury concern: 'I'm all good' - ESPN
fullText: Kylian Mbappé has downplayed concerns over what he described as a "knock on his ankle" during France's 2-0 World Cup quarterfinal win over Morocco.

text: Google starts rolling out local Documents backup on Android, lets you turn off SMS & RCS - 9to5Google
fullText: Google is rolling out new settings to control whether RCS messages are backed up. Android is beginning to roll out local Documents backup.

text: Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI’s no. 2 role - TechCrunch
fullText: OpenAI's No. 2 executive, Fidji Simo, is stepping down from her full-time role after her medical leave proved longer than expected — a leadership vacuum that comes at a tricky time as the company eyes a possible IPO and races to catch Anthropic in the enterpr…

text: New LeBron James Rumors on NBA Teams Sending Voice Notes to Star Amid Free Agency Recruitment - Bleacher Report
fullText: Interested suitors are doing whatever they can to get LeBron James' attention.
